description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. It is equipped with a fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is fitted with a large optical sight, likely a red dot or holographic type, mounted on a Picatinny rail system that extends along the top and bottom of the handguard. The barrel is long and cylindrical, ending with a device that appears to be a suppressor. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban tactical rifles.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, optical sight, and suppressor, featuring a detachable box magazine and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel and suppressor, with the optical sight visible on top.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the fixed stock, pistol grip, optical sight, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the optical sight along the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the handguard and magazine.
